question: What is the primary color of the helmet worn by the person riding the Segway? A. Black B. Green C. White D. Blue
What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: A person wearing a black helmet and dark jacket rides a black Segway with large knobby tires along a gravel path. A steep rocky hillside with sparse vegetation rises in the background behind the rider. Another person wearing a green shirt walks nearby on the left side of the path. A black dog runs on the gravel to the right of the Segway rider.

Describe the sequence of actions involving the Segway rider and the pedestrian during the clip.
canonical_answer: At 0s, a person wearing a dark helmet rides a Segway on a gravel path; at 4s, another person in a green shirt stands nearby and gestures with their hands towards the rider; at 6s, the person in the green jacket extends their hand towards the person on the Segway; at 12s, the Segway becomes stationary on the path while the walking person moves to the left.
